title: epidendrum suborbiculare
intro: Epidendrum suborbiculare, also known as the 'round-leaf Epidendrum', is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epidendrum suborbiculare include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
